title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Google India - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Google India - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Backend Developer looking for your next big career move? Google India in Ghaziabad offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Google India:
Google India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in REST APIs

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Company-sponsored certifications
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Ghaziabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Google India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
